File: swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/processor.rs (3/37 lines covered, 8.1%)

The `process` method on KanbanOperationProcessor handles directory creation, auto-init, execution, and activity logging. Nearly all logic is uncovered. Need tests for: auto-init when board not initialized, log writing, actor attribution.

#coverage-gap
